plugin.name: image
plugin.description: Image processing: thumbnail, resize, crop, format conversion, EXIF stripping

conventions.name: thumbnail
conventions.description: Generate a thumbnail of an image

conventions.name: resize
conventions.description: Resize an image to exact dimensions

conventions.name: crop
conventions.description: Crop a rectangular region from an image

conventions.name: format_convert
conventions.description: Convert image between formats (PNG, JPEG, WebP)

conventions.name: exif_strip
conventions.description: Strip EXIF metadata from an image
